title: Maniac Cop III: Badge of Silence
review: Somehow, the maniac cop has returned. The plot is now insane: the maniac cop is resurrected by a bum necromancer who has built his own cathedral n a crawl space. Maniac Kate was the worst cop ever, and her origin story was absurd. I wasn't invested at all in any of the characters, but I liked a lot of individual scenes, as nuggets of easily digestible B movie fun. I think for that reason it's my favourite of the three. None of them have any interesting characters of storylines, and this one has the best kills and stunts. I inherently like looking at Bruce Campbell's face, and I miss the rap from {Maniac Cop 2}, but I was the least bored with this one.
